2606.11562.title: GraphInfer-Bench: Benchmarking LLM's Inference Capability on Graphs
2606.11562.paper_summary: Graph analysis underlies many applications whose answers cannot be looked up in a single record or retrieved along a path: laundering rings, drug repurposing, user preference, and scientific theme are all inferred from a node together with its neighbourhood. We introduce GraphInfer-Bench, a benchmark for whether LLMs can perform this graph inference: producing an open-ended answer that no single node supports and no path retrieves. Existing graph-QA protocols cannot test this capability: algorithm simulation, node classification, single-node description, KG-QA, and GraphRAG all admit answers retrievable from one node or along a path. GraphInfer-Bench defines five tasks along Description (what a region is) and Comparison (how regions differ), each constructed so the ground truth lives in no single node. The release contains 42,000 samples across six real-world graphs, produced automatically and screened by a four-layer quality-control protocol. We evaluate four method families against the same tasks: graph-token alignment models, zero-shot frontier closed-source LLMs, Graph2Text supervised fine-tuning, and plain GNNs as a structural reference. No method family closes the gap. Graph-token alignment partially handles description tasks (relational, theme) but collapses on comparison tasks. Frontier LLMs lead on outlier detection and community partition among LLM-based methods but lag on masked-node prediction. Graph2Text SFT is the strongest LLM-based method on the description side yet falls behind frontier LLMs on comparison. Across every task, plain GNNs match or beat the strongest LLM-based row, with the largest margin on community detection. GraphInfer-Bench surfaces graph inference as an open capability gap rather than a property of any one architecture.
2606.11562.paper_summary_zh: 圖形分析是許多應用的基礎，這些應用的答案無法在單一記錄中查找或沿著某條路徑檢索：洗錢環、藥物再利用、用戶偏好和科學主題都是從一個節點及其鄰域推斷而來的。我們推出了GraphInfer-Bench，這是一個基準，用於檢測LLMs是否能夠執行這種圖形推斷：產生一個沒有單一節點支持且無法沿著任何路徑檢索的開放式答案。現有的圖形問答協議無法測試這一能力：算法模擬、節點分類、單節點描述、KG-QA和GraphRAG都允許從一個節點或沿著一條路徑檢索答案。GraphInfer-Bench定義了五個任務，涵蓋描述（某個區域是什麼）和比較（區域之間的差異），每個任務的設計使得真實答案不會存在於任何單一節點中。該釋放包含42,000個樣本，來自六個真實世界的圖形，自動生成並經過四層質量控制協議篩選。我們針對相同任務評估了四個方法系列：圖形標記對齊模型、零樣本前沿封閉源LLMs、Graph2Text監督微調，以及作為結構參考的普通GNN。沒有任何方法系列縮小了差距。圖形標記對齊在描述任務（關係、主題）上部分處理，但在比較任務上失敗。前沿LLMs在異常檢測和社區劃分方面領先於基於LLM的方法，但在遮蔽節點預測上落後。Graph2Text SFT在描述方面是最強的基於LLM的方法，但在比較上落後於前沿LLMs。在每個任務中，普通GNN的表現與最強的基於LLM的方法相當或更好，在社區檢測上差距最大。GraphInfer-Bench將圖形推斷呈現為一個開放的能力差距，而不是任何一種架構的特性。
2606.11562.author: Zhuoyi Peng et.al.
2606.11562.authors: Zhuoyi Peng, Jingzhou Jiang, Hanlin Gu, Lixin Fan, Yi Yang
